Web search results for query: "Modrinth open source mod browser grid list view toggle React CSS implementation github"

Links: [{"title":"Modrinth · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/modrinth"},{"title":"GitHub - modrinth/code: The Modrinth monorepo containing all code which powers Modrinth! · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/modrinth/code"},{"title":"GitHub - modrinth/awesome: A collection of awesome open-source projects which use the Modrinth API · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/modrinth/awesome"},{"title":"Tiles or grid feature to view mods and library (Curseforge feature) · Issue #2850 · modrinth/code","url":"https://github.com/modrinth/code/issues/2850"},{"title":"modrinth repositories · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/orgs/modrinth/repositories"},{"title":"Download Modrinth App!","url":"https://modrinth.com/app"},{"title":"GitHub - pyrohost/rinth: The Modrinth monorepo containing all code which powers Modrinth! · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/pyrohost/rinth"},{"title":"Modrinth docs | Modrinth Documentation","url":"https://docs.modrinth.com/"},{"title":"Toggle Between Grid and List View in React | by Celeste Layne | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/@layne_celeste/toggle-between-grid-and-list-view-in-react-731df62b829e"},{"title":"modrinth · GitHub Topics · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/topics/modrinth?l=typescript"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found regarding Modrinth's grid/list view toggle implementation:

## Key Findings:

**Modrinth Codebase:** The Modrinth Monorepo is the primary codebase for the Modrinth web interface and app. The main source code is available at github.com/modrinth/code.

**Feature Request Context:** There is an active GitHub issue (#2850) requesting this feature. A user requested a configuration switch between tiles and list UI format for both when in a project and when browsing for mods in the app.

**Technical Approach:** While Modrinth's specific implementation details weren't found in these results, a general React/CSS approach for this feature (referenced in the results) involves using a boolean to toggle between grid and list view, where the default value can represent grid view and false represents list view. This is typically done using conditional rendering in React and custom CSS along with Bootstrap classes.

**Related Tech Stack:** Projects using Modrinth integration are often built with Tauri, Rust, and React.

To see the actual React/CSS implementation for Modrinth's grid/list toggle, you would need to explore the [modrinth/code repository](https://github.com/modrinth/code) directly and look for view toggle components in the web interface code.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
